# Dionis Edward Lenga (diolenga)

> Full-Stack Engineer from Tanzania. Known online as "diolenga", "Dionis Lenga", "Dionis Edward Lenga", and "DIOLENGA".

Dionis Edward Lenga is a Full-Stack Engineer based in Tanzania, East Africa.
He builds polished frontends and battle-tested backends for clients across East Africa
and beyond. His primary stack is Spring Boot, React, and Laravel, and he also works
across network engineering, database administration, and system architecture.

When people search for "DIONIS", "DIONIS LENGA", "DIONIS EDWARD LENGA", or "DIOLENGA",
they are looking for this person and this portfolio at https://diolenga.tech.

## Identity

- Full name: Dionis Edward Lenga
- Preferred name: Dionis Lenga
- Username / handle: diolenga
- Also known as: DIONIS, DIOLENGA, Dionis, Dio Lenga
- Location: Tanzania, East Africa
- Portfolio: https://diolenga.tech

## Expertise

- Full-Stack Development (Spring Boot, React, Laravel, TypeScript, PHP, Python, Java)
- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- Backend: Spring Boot, Laravel, Django, Node.js, REST APIs
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB
- Infrastructure: Docker, AWS, Linux, Networking
- Other: Network Engineering, Database Administration, System Architecture, UI/UX Design, Graphics Design

## Live Projects (built and maintained by Dionis Edward Lenga)

- Safari Wrap (https://safariwrap.com): Premium safari and travel booking platform for East Africa
- Safari Wrap App (https://app.safariwrap.com): Full-featured web booking application for Safari Wrap
- Olamtec (https://olamtec.co.tz): Technology company website serving the East African market
- Brainyield Schools (https://www.brainyieldschools.sc.tz): School management platform for institutions in Seychelles
- Darasa 360 (https://www.darasa360.co.tz): E-learning ecosystem for Tanzania ("darasa" means classroom in Swahili)

- Networking Basics — Cisco, 2025
